lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Hogst
lines.text: Woooo wooo wooooo woooo

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Hogst
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How are you doing?

lines.speaker: Hogst
lines.text: Wait. You can understand me?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I can understand ghosts.

lines.speaker: Hogst
lines.text: Oh how splendid! Every time I come back here I try to talk to people, but no one seems to understand.

lines.speaker: Hogst
lines.text: I was telling my friend Bob this the other day in the afterlife. At least he can relate to the struggle of people not understanding.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That must be frustrating.

lines.speaker: Hogst
lines.text: Yes, it really is.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wait a second. Your friend Bob... does he happen to be a cat?

lines.speaker: Hogst
lines.text: Why, yes, he is! Do you know Bob?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I do! How is he doing?

lines.speaker: Hogst
lines.text: He's alright, all things considered. He did speak of a human friend he misses though. I suspect that's you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I miss him too. Could you tell him I said hi? And tell him I'm sorry he got killed. I wish I could have saved him.

lines.speaker: Hogst
lines.text: I will tell him that you miss him. Regarding his death, he said it was necessary, so please don't feel bad about it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Necessary? What do you mean?

lines.speaker: Hogst
lines.text: He never explained why, only said that it had to be that way.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What can you tell me about Eve?

lines.speaker: Hogst
lines.text: Eve? One of the greatest witches I know. Also the oldest person I know. She's been around for practically forever.

lines.speaker: Hogst
lines.text: It is said that when she was alive she was a hard working witch, mastering advanced spells at a very young age.

lines.speaker: Hogst
lines.text: Unfortunately she died while still a young adult. That's why she looks so young now, despite being centuries old.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How can she still be around after all these years?

lines.speaker: Hogst
lines.text: Like I said, she mastered spells at a very young age. She took some of that magic with her into the afterlife.

lines.speaker: Hogst
lines.text: The sad truth about Eve is that she spent all her life working and striving to achieve great things.

lines.speaker: Hogst
lines.text: But she never got to relax and appreciate how far she had come. That is why she is so obsessed with partying now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I understand. That really makes you think, doesn't it.

lines.speaker: Hogst
lines.text: Indeed. Enjoy the moment while you can, because you may not get another. Take it from me, I'm a ghost.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Goodbye.

lines.speaker: Hogst
lines.text: Goodbye.
